titleStmt.title: SII 24.552: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 552. (A.R. No. 105 of 1937-38.) V PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL OF THE GARUḌA-MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Seems to register gift of a village (name lost) by Kēśavarāju, son of Gaṇaparāju and grandson of Veṅkaṭappa of Śrīvatsa-gōtra and residing in Chiru- tanāpalli (mistake for Tiruchināpaḷḷi) in the kingdom of Chokkanātha-Nāyaka (son of) Viśvanātha-Nāyaka and another gift of some lands in Maṁjapūru for worship of the image of Varadarāja and for maintaining a feeding house (Rāmānujakūṭam). The record is dated Śaka 1596, Ānanda, Pushya, śu. 15, Friday, Pushya corresponding regularly to A.D. 1675, January 1, Friday; ·77; ·79. There was a lunar eclipse on this day which is however not quoted in the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī śālivāhana śakā
bdaṁ 1596 yiṁdumīṁdda cellēṭi Ānaṁdda
nāmasaṁvva saṁvvatsara puṣyaśu 15lu bhcaguvāra
ṁ puṣyasakṣatraṁ śubhayōga śubhakaraṇaṁ kūḍina
śubhadinamaṁddu . dakṣiṇagaṭu pāṁḍyakulāśa
ni vaḷanāṁḍḍu nityōtsavavidhivaranāṁḍu tiruvaraṁgaṁ
tirupati śrīraṁgganāthasvāmi śrībhaṁḍārānake śrīmatu
viśvanāthanāyanayyavāri cokkanāthanayyavāri rā
jyaṁ cirutanāpallelōnu vuṁnna śrīvatsa Āgōtra Āpastaṁbha
sūtraṁ yajuśākhādhyāyulaina Akili veṁkaṭappa kumāruṁḍu
gaṇaparāju kumāruṁḍu kēśavarāju sāṣṭāṁga daṇḍaṁ samappin®ṁ
cci śrīraṁganāthasvāmi dēvaḷamunaku grāmaṁmu ve yi
ccinakramame vīdhi dakkṣiṇaṁvīdhi
nayanārayyagāri nivēśanamunaku tū
¨rpphu rōhaṇa maṁṭapamunaku śrīraṁggarāyaku
Āru vokadinamu dinamu vokaṁṭiki Āragiṁpuvā
ga 692 dadhyōdanaṁ taḷigelu 2ki 14ki bha 14
1500ki 91 gaṁdhapoḍi 8ka 92 Arituga
maṁṭapamunaku
ma
vihāramaṁṭapamu 1ki parivaṭaṁ tirumaṁgā
saṁnidhi dīpārādhanaku camuruku
tī¨rthānaku yālakulu pa 3 Āragiṁpu
na nānaku taḷikhelu ki ga4
ga 584 vaḍalu ki ga 584 Atirasamulu 300ki
ga 894 borugulu taḷikhe 1ki gā pānaramugō
salu bellakigta pesaru gaṁjagūnalu 2ki kiga nirumajjiga gō
nalu 1 nārikēḷamu teṁkāyalu 9 4 Ā
nu Araṁṭisaṁḍu 500ki ga ß carakuluṁga 0 ß
lu palamulu nalubhai 0 Ākulu 100ki ga
maṁṭapamu muṁdaranu Iṁṭe
Ābharaṇaṁ
dīvaṭṭīlu
goḍugulu paṭṭēvāriki kūli ga § Aṁtu maṁṭapamunaku
Aṁttu rathārōhaṇa maṁṭapa mahōtsavamunaku Ā
ragiṁpunaku cellu ga 59nnu yī maṁṭapamunaku pratiṣṭhacēsina vara
darājulaku kriṣṇunikinni dēvaḷaṁ kaṇajāna yiccēdi di 1ki biyyaṁ ku
ṁcaṁ 10ki l 1 ce camuruku . ki l . dīpamu camuruku . ki l va
ṁṭaceruku kūragāya miriyālu paßki ṟa vi § jilakarameṁ
tu yālakulu lavaṇaṁ Aṁtu vī ß1ki nela 1ki ga 2 1 .
saṁvatsaraṁ 1ki ga 84ß Aṁttu ga 14nu mōna paravaṇita
cāta nūtiki paḍamara cinanāyani satrānaku tū¨rpphu maṁjapūru grā
mamu 1ki varimaḍi nelacetulu 40ki varanarājula Āragiṁpunakunnu
rāmānujakūṭamunaku cina nelacētulu koḍigu ttacētulu 5nnu
Āḍiguṁḍicētulu 3nnu Ācelagāka ce 32nu cēnipaṁṭalu
bhalavikramulunu kaluyi yīdha¨rma
rāmu valadayagāri pā¨rśvamu nāraṁganaka Ācaṁ
drā¨rkkasthāyigāsu putrapautra pāraṁparyaṁgānu yīdha¨rmaṁ
ṁdaru vaccina bhāvyamu kōvelanu Āragiṁpulōnu vaccina
kaṭṭaḍabhāvyamu naḍipiṁccukuni Anubhaviṁccagalavāru yī śilā
śāsanamu vrāsinavāru stalakaraṇamu nāmaya vrāsina śāsana
mu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 24.552 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
